creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
OK, I'll bite: why did you remove the keyword "patch" when there's a tarball and 2 patches [to the tarball] herein?

As an aside, it's now been 8 1/2 months since I posted these bug fixes and improvements.  In that time, 14.1, 14.2, and 13.4 have come out, with no apparent interest.  Yes, in the beginning I mistakenly marked maintainer-feedback, thinking it meant "do you want to hear back from the maintainer", but that was corrected months ago.
